raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is reachable from the left/right sides; there is sufficient lateral clearance for both end-effectors to establish a stable bilateral hold without colliding with box_1 or the table surface.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted slightly above box_1, clearing the top face of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (clear area to the right of box_1)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is held above the stack; the placement area on the table to the right of box_1 is reachable and free of obstacles, providing a stable support surface.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is placed on the table to the right of box_1 and released; box_1 top becomes accessible."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The top of box_1 is no longer blocked by box_2; left/right sides and front of box_1 are accessible with enough clearance for a two-arm lateral grasp; the robot can apply balanced forces to avoid sliding the box on the table.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box (box_1) is securely lifted off the table and under full control of the robot."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is reachable from the left/right sides; there is sufficient lateral clearance for both end-effectors to establish a stable bilateral hold without colliding with box_1 or the table surface.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted slightly above box_1, clearing the top face of box_1.

parsed_json.Target: table (clear area to the right of box_1)
parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is held above the stack; the placement area on the table to the right of box_1 is reachable and free of obstacles, providing a stable support surface.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is placed on the table to the right of box_1 and released; box_1 top becomes accessible.

parsed_json.Precondition: The top of box_1 is no longer blocked by box_2; left/right sides and front of box_1 are accessible with enough clearance for a two-arm lateral grasp; the robot can apply balanced forces to avoid sliding the box on the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box (box_1) is securely lifted off the table and under full control of the robot.
